title: Log Horizon
sourceNotes: S1 anime (25 eps, 2013-2014) paired with the Kazuhiro Hara manga adaptation (10 chapters, finished). Both adapt the Mamare Touno light novel; the manga covered only the early arc. S2 (eps 26-50) and Destruction of the Round Table (eps 51-62) go beyond the manga's coverage and have no manga reference.
